title: Big Globe - YUNG's Better Witch Huts Compatibility
description: Data pack to generate YUNG's Better Witch Huts in a Big Globe world.
body:
**At the time I made this, I had no access to the Big Globe discord server. There is probably a better, updated datapack on there.**

This data pack allows YUNG's Better Witch Huts to generate in a Big Globe world.
